name: whyvec
description: Counterfactual compiler evidence for safe, repository-aware loop optimization.

interface.shortDescription: Turn missed vectorization into tested compiler obligations.
interface.longDescription: WhyVec gives Codex reproducible counterfactual compiler evidence, then guides repository-aware repair selection, validation, or refusal.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use WhyVec evidence to diagnose this missed vectorization, inspect repository contracts, and select, validate, or refuse a safe repair.
